entries.rationale: Test whether crowding extremes in perp funding combined with open-interest expansion mean-revert on the liquid perp core.
entries.expected_edge: If the crowding thesis is real, extreme positive funding with OI expansion should reverse over the next rebalance horizon after realistic execution costs.
entries.invalidates_if: Rank IC, top-minus-bottom spread, or executable capacity fail once the signal is evaluated on the liquid perp core with perp-first execution.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Extreme perp funding with concurrent open-interest expansion proxies one-sided crowding that should mean-revert once positioning is saturated.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Short the most crowded positive-funding names and long the most crowded negative-funding names after OI expands.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: reverse(sign(funding_zscore_20) * abs(funding_zscore_20)) filtered by positive oi_change_5

entries.rationale: Test whether cross-sectional basis dislocations on the liquid perp core converge once execution friction and inventory capacity are enforced.
entries.expected_edge: If basis dislocations are compensating mispricings rather than noise, the most stretched names should mean-revert after ranking on basis z-scores.
entries.invalidates_if: The spread disappears after realistic perp execution, or the signal only survives in a single quarter/window.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Perp basis extremes proxy transient imbalance between perp and spot demand that should compress once liquidity providers re-anchor pricing.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Fade the largest positive and negative basis z-score extremes on the liquid perp core.

entries.rationale: Keep an explicit event-drift research slot, but do not execute it daily until event coverage is real and auditable.
entries.expected_edge: If narrative and event shocks create post-event drift, event features should pass factor evidence before any model overlay is considered.
entries.invalidates_if: Event coverage is missing, event features do not survive factor evidence, or the setup falls back to generic momentum.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Exogenous event and narrative shocks can create short-lived continuation or decay that should be tested explicitly rather than approximated with generic trend features.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Trade post-event continuation or exhaustion only when explicit event or narrative columns are present.
